title: Managers in transport and distribution
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate transportation, storage, or distribution activities in accordance with organizational policies and applicable government laws or regulations. Includes logistics managers. Direct or coordinate production, purchasing, warehousing, distribution, or financial forecasting services or activities to limit costs and improve accuracy, customer service, or safety. Examine existing procedures or opportunities for streamlining activities to meet product distribution needs. Direct the movement, storage, or processing of inventory. Plan, direct, or coordinate entertainment and recreational activities and operations of a recreational facility, including cruise ships and parks. (Based on 19 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Coordinate or perform activities associated with shipping, receiving, distribution, or transportation to meet product distribution needs.
Plan, direct, or coordinate transportation, storage, or distribution activities in accordance with organizational policies and regulations.
Monitor inventory levels of products or materials in warehouses and requisition or purchase supplies as needed.
Supervise crews in loading or unloading cargo and ensure compliance with specifications during these activities.
Examine existing supply chain practices and provide recommendations to improve efficiency, reduce costs, or enhance safety.
Direct or coordinate activities of subordinate staff to ensure that work is accomplished in accordance with quality standards and regulations.
Interview, select, and train warehouse and supervisory personnel and provide guidance in their job duties or the resolution of complaints.
Develop or implement procedures for continuous monitoring and improvement of supply chain performance and compliance with regulations.
Negotiate with suppliers, vendors, carriers, or other partners to obtain advantageous terms and pricing for logistics services.
Conduct audits and inspections of operations to ensure compliance with safety standards and regulatory requirements in logistics activities.
Review all regulatory agency submission materials to ensure compliance with standards.
Respond to and resolve customer inquiries or complaints regarding services rendered.
Explain rules and regulations of facilities and entertainments to customers.
Interview and hire associates to fill staff vacancies and ensure appropriate staffing levels.
Plan, organize, or lead group activities and programs for customers, such as fitness or recreational events.
Train workers in company procedures, operations, and policy compliance.
Calculate and record department expenses and revenue for budgeting purposes.
Assign tasks and schedule work hours to ensure efficiency among staff.
Monitor compliance with operational and safety procedures in the facility.
Develop and maintain documentation related to compliance activities and procedures.
Plan or implement strategies to improve inventory control, safety, or operational effectiveness.
Maintain records of facility operations and compliance activities.
Supervise employees or subcontractors to ensure quality of work or adherence to safety regulations or policies.
Confer with customers, supervisors, contractors, or other personnel to exchange information or to resolve problems.
Plan work assignments and equipment allocations to meet transportation, operations or production goals.
Inspect materials, vehicles, equipment, or facilities to ensure that they are safe, free of defects, and consistent with specifications.
Prepare, compile, and submit reports on work activities, operations, production, or work-related accidents.
Review orders, production schedules, blueprints, or shipping or receiving notices to determine work sequences and material shipping dates.
Update schedules, estimates, forecasts, or budgets for projects.
Direct workers in transportation or related services, such as moving, storing, or loading or unloading of materials.
Monitor project milestones and deliverables and ensure proper performance and use of materials.
Recruit and hire staff members or propose, review, or approve modifications to project plans.
Enforce safety rules and regulations and resolve worker problems in collaboration with employees for solutions.
